narrative:
New Franklin 1-C (precinct in Summit County) has 772 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
